insights: Total sales of 8,278,519.42 with an average revenue of 20.61 per transaction.
The top product by sales volume is the WHITE HANGING HEART T-LIGHT HOLDER, accounting for 2058 transactions.
356,728 transactions were made from the United Kingdom, representing 88.8% of total sales.
recommendations: Focus marketing efforts on the United Kingdom as it accounts for a significant portion of sales.
Increase inventory for the top-selling products to maximize revenue potential.
Analyze the time series data to identify seasonal patterns for better inventory and sales forecasting.
